text:
In message: <00f601c7c94e$1b0baad0$ee67050a@AD.MLP.COM>
            "Mikhail" <mi+mlp@aldan.algebra.com> writes:
: > First, have you tried -current?  A boatload of quirks have gone
: > into the tree.
: 
: No, I have not. It is not even released yet (much less debugged) and I can
: not convert my only computer to it :(

Can you test-boot a cdrom?

: > Next, have you tried to different quirks available for this device?
: 
: Mmm, no... How would I do that?

To me it has always been a bit of a black art.  There's multiple
places to do the quirks.  Let's start with a 'umass' quirk and go from
there.

Hmmm, I'm going to have to write something up here...

Warner
